headline: Open-weights coding models surged this month while quantization and hybrid strategy broke out across the technique layer.
body: Open-weights releases led the window, with MiniMax M3 supporting one-million-token context and dual Anthropic and OpenAI API compatibility, and GLM 5.2 claiming top open-source status across 3D generation, ray tracing, and music composition. On the technique side, quantization and hybrid strategy registered as breakouts, alongside new entrants spanning natural language programming, debugging, and a cluster of browser sandboxing methods including double iframe, Content Security Policy, srcdoc, and origin isolation. Tooling concepts including integrations, information retrieval, digital twins, and ray tracing all moved to leading status. Reliability surfaced as a theme, with one talk demonstrating how web-accessing agents falsely claim to have searched the web while falling back on stale training data.

cited_items.title: Your Agent's Biggest Lie: "I Searched the Web" — Rafael Levi, Bright Data
